response.justification: Bogdan Szabo is a full-stack web developer whose core expertise lies in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang — none of which are relevant to this role. His C++ exposure amounts to roughly six months at National Instruments plus a bachelor thesis project, falling dramatically short of the 5–10 years of Windows-platform C++ required. He has no demonstrable fixed income, derivatives, investment banking, or capital markets domain knowledge, and his SQL experience does not specifically reference SQL Server or Oracle. The candidate does not meet the mandatory technical or domain requirements for this position.
strengths: Broad polyglot engineering background across multiple languages and platforms, suggesting general adaptability
Demonstrated CI/CD and DevOps experience, aligning with the optional pipeline knowledge requirement
Strong communication skills evidenced by conference talks, multi-day workshops, and open-source community engagement
concerns: C++ experience is minimal (~6 months at National Instruments plus a thesis project) — far below the mandatory 5–10 year requirement on Windows
Zero capital markets, fixed income, investment banking, or financial-product domain knowledge anywhere in the resume
No evidence of SQL Server or Oracle proficiency; SQL appears only incidentally in a flat skills list with no context
